markdownRemark.html:
I don’t have time to write a proper blog post, but here are some of the links I found useful today:

Event hashtag: #hackitmsft

  • https://dev.windows.com/en-us/iot
  • IOT: Download the hands on lab: Developing for Internet of Things
  • Data: Download the hands on lab: Machine Learning without a PhD
  • Get started with Event Hubs
  • Send Data into Azure Event Hubs using Web Api’s HttpClient
  • Connect tiny devices to Microsoft Azure services to build IoT solutions http://connectthedots.io

Thanks to Microsoft for a fun and informative day.
